name: Zigbee Gateway (Wired)

description.consumer:
The hub your home thinks through.

Everything connects to this. The Zigbee Gateway sits quietly on your network — wired for stability — and gives your entire smart home a reliable brain. Pair it once. Trust it always.
description.technical:
A wired Zigbee 3.0 gateway that acts as the central coordinator for all Zigbee devices in the system. Connects via Ethernet for a stable, low-latency network backbone.

Supports up to 128 Zigbee devices and enables device pairing, scene automation, remote control, and unified device management through compatible mobile applications and automation platforms.

Key Specifications
- Device Type: Zigbee Coordinator / Gateway
- Protocol: Zigbee 3.0
- Network: Wired Ethernet (LAN)
- Capacity: Up to 128 Zigbee devices
- Installation: Indoor, fixed LAN connection

⚠ Does not control electrical loads. A stable wired Ethernet connection is required for reliable operation.

specs.summary: Wireless Connection: Zigbee | Max Connected Devices: 300 (wired) | Working Temperature: -10°C to +55°C | Power Input: USB-C 5V 2A | Connectivity: RJ45 Ethernet | Working Humidity: 10%–90% RH (non-condensing)
specs.compatibility: Home Assistant and compatible Zigbee automation platforms

limitations: Does not control electrical loads. Requires stable LAN connection for operation.
